ADA.name: Activity on Dormant Account
ADA.red_flag: Monitors for First activity of client after a long period of dormancy.

TLHA-I.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Inbound
TLHA-I.red_flag: This rule identifies significant increase in deposit values (fiat and crypto) across a rolling timeframe

TLHA-O.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Outbound
TLHA-O.red_flag: This rule identifies significant increase in withdrawal values (fiat and crypto) across a rolling timeframe.

LVP-I.name: Low Value Payments - Inbound
LVP-I.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value incoming transactions just below a threshold

LVP-O.name: Low Value Payments - Outbound
LVP-O.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value outbound transactions just below a threshold

SAWD.name: Similar Amounts Withdrawal / Deposits
SAWD.red_flag: Monitors for pass-through activity in the account wherein the Total sum of inbound transactions similar to sum of outbound transactions

HVSDLW.name: High Volume of Small Deposits followed by an immediate Large sum Withdrawal
HVSDLW.red_flag: Monitors for high frequency of low value inbound transactions that is immediately followed by a large withdrawal in a short period.

P2P-HCA.name: High Cumulative Amount - Inbound and Outbound for P2P
P2P-HCA.red_flag: Monitors the cummulative amount of user's inbound and outbound transactions

RRN.name: Regulatory Reporting Netherlands
RRN.red_flag:
Local reporting obligation

This rule would only monitor for Netherlands customer only.

FT9.name: Excessive Withdrawal
FT9.red_flag: Monitors customer sum of outbound withdrawal (Fiat & Crypto) that are greater than EUR 100,000 over their lifetime

FT5.name: Excessive Incoming FIAT/Crypto Deposits (24 hours) /SMURFING
FT5.red_flag: Monitors high frequency inbound payments (Fiat and Crypto) within 24 hours

ETLT1.name:
EDD Threshold Limit (≥10,000,000 EUR)/ Equivalent in crypto amount - Tier 1
USD -> EUR per SE-4703
ETLT1.red_flag: Rule meant to trigger EDD to obtain SOW/SOF.

ETLT2.name:
EDD Threshold Limit (≥20,000,000 EUR)/ Equivalent in crypto amount - Tier 2
USD -> EUR per SE-4703
ETLT2.red_flag: Rule meant to trigger EDD to obtain SOW/SOF.

CIBO.name: Change in Behavior (exceed current estimated investment amount)
CIBO.red_flag: Monitors for deviation from customer's original investment activity

EICD30D.name: Excessive Incoming CRYPTO Deposits (30d)
EICD30D.red_flag: Monitors for excessive crypto deposits within 1 month

EOCR30D.name: Excessive Outcoming CRYPTO Withdrawals (30d)
EOCR30D.red_flag: Monitors for excessive crypto withdrawals within 1 month

DORMANT.name: Activity on Dormant Account
DORMANT.red_flag: Monitors for First activity of client after a long period of dormancy.

HCAHAI.name: High Cumulative Amount - Historic Average - Inbound
HCAHAI.red_flag: Monitors for Sum of incoming crypto deposits over a set period of time is greater than a limit

HCAHAO.name: High Cumulative Amount - Historic Average - Outbound
HCAHAO.red_flag: Monitors for Sum of Outbound crypto withdrawals over a set period of time is greater than a limit

CIBC.name: Change in Behavior (exceed current estimated investment amount)
CIBC.red_flag: Monitors for deviation from customer's current investment activity

BF-ADA.name: Activity on Dormant Account
BF-ADA.red_flag: Monitors for First activity of client after a long period of dormancy.

BF-TLHA-I.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Inbound
BF-TLHA-I.red_flag: Monitors for Inbound transaction exceeding client’s historical average

BF-TLHA-O.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Outbound
BF-TLHA-O.red_flag: Monitors for Outbound transaction exceeding client’s historical average

BF-LVP-I.name: Low Value Payments - Inbound
BF-LVP-I.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value incoming transactions just below a threshold

BF-LVP-O.name: Low Value Payments - Outbound
BF-LVP-O.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value outbound transactions just below a threshold

BF-SAWD.name: Similar Amounts Withdrawal / Deposits
BF-SAWD.red_flag: Monitors for Total sum of inbound transactions similar to sum of outbound transactions

BF-HVSDLW.name: High Volume of Small Deposits followed by an immediate Large sum
BF-HVSDLW.red_flag: Monitors for high frequency of low value inbound transactions that is immediately followed by a large withdrawal in a short period.

TCRJ.name: Transaction with counterparty in "High" risk jurisdiction
TCRJ.red_flag: Monitors for transactions made to/from a customer located in a country not a member of a FATF or FATF-style regional body

BF-STR-I.name: Structuring Payments - Inbound
BF-STR-I.red_flag: Monitors inbound transactions, triggering if the accumulated amount reaches or exceeds EUR 25,000 within a 7 day period

BF-STR-O.name: Structuring Payments - Outbound
BF-STR-O.red_flag: Monitors outbound transactions, triggering if the accumulated amount reaches or exceeds EUR 25,000 within a 7 day period

BF-ULT-I.name: Unusually Large Transactions - Inbound
BF-ULT-I.red_flag: Monitors for unusually large aggregate inbound transactions.

BF-ULT-O.name: Unusually Large Transactions - Outbound
BF-ULT-O.red_flag: Monitors for unusually large aggregate outbound transactions.

BF-TLHA-IC.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Inbound
BF-TLHA-IC.red_flag: Monitors for Inbound transaction exceeding client’s historical average

BF-TLHA-OC.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Outbound
BF-TLHA-OC.red_flag: Monitors for Outbound transaction exceeding client’s historical average

MCOC_1.name: Multiple Customers, One Counterparty
MCOC_1.red_flag: Monitors for hidden relationship between customers

OCMC_1.name: Multiple Counterparties, One Customer

BPAYGLOB-HVSDLW.name: High Volume of Small Deposits followed by an immediate Large sum
BPAYGLOB-HVSDLW.red_flag: Monitors for high frequency of low value inbound transactions that is immediately followed by a large withdrawal in a short period.

TLHA_I_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Inbound (Dynamic)
TLHA_I_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.red_flag: This rule identifies significant increase in deposit values (fiat and crypto) across a rolling timeframe

TLHA_O_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.name: Transaction Limit - Historic Average - Outbound (Dynamic)
TLHA_O_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.red_flag: This rule identifies significant increase in withdrawal values (fiat and crypto) across a rolling timeframe.

SAWD_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.name: Similar Amounts Withdrawal / Deposits (Dynamic)
SAWD_DYNAMIC_USER_COHORT.red_flag: Monitors for pass-through activity in the account wherein the Total sum of inbound transactions similar to sum of outbound transactions

AU_LVP_I.name: Australia Low Value Payments - Inbound
AU_LVP_I.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value incoming transactions just below a threshold

AU_LVP_O.name: Australia Low Value Payments - Outbound
AU_LVP_O.red_flag: Monitors for structuring of payments - significant number of low value outbound transactions just below a threshold

PIT.name: Physically Impossible Travel
PIT.red_flag: This rule will flag user accounts that exhibit login behaviour from geographically disparate IP addresses within a timeframe that would require travel speeds exceeding plausible physical limits (specifically, faster than 600 km/h—faster than typical commercial airplanes).
